content: 1. Atomic CAS lock on auction_won (auction_locked) — prevents double-creation under race
2. is_locked_after_win flag + _ensure_not_locked() guard on create_deposit, confirm_payment, edit endpoints
5. Audit log collection (audit_events) + _audit() helper, wired into auction_won + deposit + contract events
Tests: extend test_p13_auction.py with 5 hardening scenarios (race-lock, post-win lock, fx persistence, deposit linkage, audit trail)
Run all tests + verify no regression on P1.1
